body: Task: Close the  bootstrap-shell seam by making the binary delegate to a real  path instead of ending in the current print-only stub. Keep the cut narrow: use the existing  /  seam, add executable coverage for the chosen path, and if a real server implementation is still blocked, leave an explicit blocker tied to the missing product seam rather than another comment-only shell. Success criteria:  no longer ends at , there is executable proof for the bootstrap path you chose, and you report exact proof or blocker. Relevant files: crates/cairn-app/src/main.rs, crates/cairn-api/src/bootstrap.rs, crates/cairn-app/Cargo.toml.
